_doc: Raven Hollow mount collection. Consumed by MountSystem (scripts/systems/mount_system.gd). speed_bonus is the fractional move-speed increase applied while mounted (tier I ~0.6, tier II ~1.0). source: vendor|rep|drop|quest|event|tame|trophy|class. price = gold cost at a trainer (vendor/rep mounts). trainer = which stablemaster stocks it. trophy_enemy/trophy_rank = elite whose kill unlocks it (Witcher-style). class_adv = class ids that ride it best (a small extra speed edge + a note). art is a Fable TODO; MountSystem emits mount_visual_requested and applies a placeholder tint/scale only.

lowland_dun.name: Lowland Dun
lowland_dun.lore: Farm stock out of the Western Lowlands. Honest, mud-colored, alive.

vetka_mudplodder.name: Vetka Mudplodder
vetka_mudplodder.lore: She remembers you when you were slower. She is polite about it.

riverfork_courser.name: Riverfork Courser
riverfork_courser.lore: Bred to outrun the toll. The toll was never coin.

queens_grey.name: Queen's Grey
queens_grey.lore: Fielderine's stables give grey horses to people the crown owes.

famine_cart_draft.name: Famine-Cart Draft
famine_cart_draft.lore: It pulled a cart of grain past starving villages. It did not choose the route.

bloodroad_warhorse.name: Bloodroad Warhorse
bloodroad_warhorse.lore: Convoy stock. Flinches at nothing except a count of three.

convoy_breaker.name: Convoy-Breaker
convoy_breaker.lore: Barded in basaltfang plate. The ledger line for the barding reads 'collected'.

obsidian_direwolf.name: Obsidian Dire-Wolf
obsidian_direwolf.lore: The packs of Basaltfang judge a rider by one measure: whether the wolf agrees to be ridden.

ash_hound.name: Ash-Hound
ash_hound.lore: It walks the warm ground without reading it. Envy that.

forge_hound.name: Forge-Hound
forge_hound.lore: Raised under the hammers. When they all stop, it stops. Count with it.

valrom_pit_brute.name: Valrom's Pit-Brute
valrom_pit_brute.lore: It fought in the Debt Pit and was never once entered in the ledger.

the_unhitched.name: The Unhitched
the_unhitched.lore: A night-coach horse that outlived its coach, its driver, and its route.

riddlers_walker.name: Riddler's Walker
riddlers_walker.lore: However you approach it, you are approaching it from behind. Mount quickly.

lichen_pale_colt.name: Lichen-Pale Colt
lichen_pale_colt.lore: Foaled in the dark, lit from inside. It has never needed a lantern. Neither will you.

gravemark_bone_steed.name: Gravemark Bone-Steed
gravemark_bone_steed.lore: Raised from the kerb-rows. Some assembly was required. Not all of it is horse.

pale_mare_twelfth.name: Pale Mare of the Twelfth Row
pale_mare_twelfth.lore: Thread-driven. When you dismount she stands utterly still, facing the Pit, until you need her.

thread_silver.name: Thread-Silver Stallion
thread_silver.lore: Blue filament runs where the veins were. It is not cold to the touch. That is the unsettling part.

snow_wolf.name: Snow-Wolf of the Threadlands
snow_wolf.lore: The pack left it behind for standing still too long. It listens less than the others. Barely.

great_elk.name: Great Elk of the Hunts
great_elk.lore: Elk the size of cottages move through the fog like grey ships. This one consented to a passenger. Once.

fogship_doe.name: Fogship Doe
fogship_doe.lore: She walks the dying forest like it is still green. For the length of the ride, you almost believe her.

blood_boar.name: Blood-Fattened Boar
blood_boar.lore: The harvest is red and good and so is he. Do not ask the furrows what he eats.

bog_ox.name: Bog-Ox of the Iron Vein
bog_ox.lore: It has stood in the metallic river its whole life and holds no opinion about the color.

canal_skiff.name: Canal Skiff
canal_skiff.lore: A flat-bottomed skiff and a black pole. In Greyhollow this IS a horse.

ledger_brass.name: Ledger-Brass Courser
ledger_brass.lore: Its shoes are stamped with serial numbers. It has been repossessed four times. It always comes back.

collected_horse.name: The Collected Horse
collected_horse.lore: Marked collected. Filed. Closed. It is still walking. Someone in the Archive is very upset about this.

morven_grey.name: Morven Grey
morven_grey.lore: Trained to stand in gaslight without casting a shadow. Do not ask the trainers how.

lantern_mare.name: The Kept-Name Lantern Mare
lantern_mare.lore: A lantern hangs at her throat with a name in it. Not hers. She carries it anyway.

proofing_ram.name: Proofing-Cellar Ram
proofing_ram.lore: It has carried worse than you out of that cellar, in worse condition, faster.

thinning_mare.name: The Thinning Mare
thinning_mare.lore: During the Thinning she is entirely visible. The rest of the year, check the stable anyway.

winter_vigil_elk.name: Winter Vigil Elk
winter_vigil_elk.lore: Antlers hung with kept-flame lamps. It walks at feast-pace. Nothing you do will hurry it.

gallows_rook.name: The Gallows Rook
gallows_rook.lore: The rooks choose one warden a generation. At sixty, the wardens learn what the rooks ride. It is rooks.
